paper_title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale

raw_extraction.innovation: Direct application of Transformer encoder architecture to image recognition without convolutional inductive biases, treating images as sequences of flattened patches.
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, transfer learning to various downstream tasks including VTAB benchmark, few-shot learning.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable image recognition with minimal inductive biases, leveraging large-scale pre-training for improved generalization.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Linear probe (few-shot evaluation) and full fine-tuning on ImageNet
raw_extraction.extension: Uses a learnable [class] token for image representation alongside patch embeddings, inspired by transformer models for text
raw_extraction.paper_title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale

raw_extraction.innovation: Same core idea as ViT-B/32 but with higher-resolution patch embedding (16x16 instead of 32x32), allowing finer-grained feature extraction.
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, transfer learning to various downstream tasks including VTAB benchmark, few-shot learning.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable image recognition with minimal inductive biases, leveraging large-scale pre-training for improved generalization.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Linear probe (few-shot evaluation) and full fine-tuning on ImageNet
raw_extraction.extension: Uses a learnable [class] token for image representation alongside patch embeddings, inspired by transformer models for text
raw_extraction.paper_title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale

raw_extraction.innovation: Larger model variant with deeper transformer layers and wider hidden dimensions compared to ViT-B/32, demonstrating scalability benefits with sufficient pre-training data.
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, transfer learning to various downstream tasks including VTAB benchmark, few-shot learning.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable image recognition with minimal inductive biases, leveraging large-scale pre-training for improved generalization.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Linear probe (few-shot evaluation) and full fine-tuning on ImageNet
raw_extraction.extension: Uses a learnable [class] token for image representation alongside patch embeddings, inspired by transformer models for text
raw_extraction.paper_title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale

raw_extraction.innovation: Largest model variant among base/large variants, combining high-resolution patch embedding (16x16) with increased model capacity, outperforming ResNet baselines with equivalent compute.
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, transfer learning to various downstream tasks including VTAB benchmark, few-shot learning.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable image recognition with minimal inductive biases, leveraging large-scale pre-training for improved generalization.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Linear probe (few-shot evaluation) and full fine-tuning on ImageNet
raw_extraction.extension: Uses a learnable [class] token for image representation alongside patch embeddings, inspired by transformer models for text
raw_extraction.paper_title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale

raw_extraction.innovation: High-capacity model variant with highest resolution patch embedding (14x14) and largest model size, designed to evaluate scaling laws and performance-compute trade-offs.
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, transfer learning to specialized datasets like Natural and Structured tasks in VTAB.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating the impact of model scale and resolution on image recognition performance with large-scale pre-training.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Linear probe (few-shot evaluation) and full fine-tuning on ImageNet
raw_extraction.extension: Uses a learnable [class] token for image representation alongside patch embeddings, inspired by transformer models for text
raw_extraction.paper_title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale
